step_rationale: Polyol metabolite associated with ACS risk and myocardial infarction prognostication.
mechanism: A polyol reflecting myocardial metabolic perturbation and osmotic stress, used in prognostic stratification of acute coronary syndrome risk.

references.title: GC-MS validation and analysis of targeted plasma metabolites related to carbonyl stress in type 2 diabetes mellitus patients with and without acute coronary syndrome.

Predictive metabolites for incident myocardial infarction: a two-step meta-analysis of individual patient data from six cohorts comprising 7897 individuals from the COnsortium of METabolomics Studies.
